choices.text: Forward: joints → end-effector pose. Easy; chain transformations T1×T2×...×Tn. Inverse: pose → joints; hard, multi-solution, no closed-form for 6+ DoF. Solvers: KDL, TRAC-IK, MoveIt.

questions.explanation: FK easy chain; IK hard inverse problem.

choices.text: Likely singularity: Jacobian loses rank → can't move in some direction. E.g., arm fully extended can't move along its axis. Plan paths to avoid singular configurations; or use damped pseudoinverse.
